name: Room Laundering
overview: Miko Yakumo (Elaiza Ikeda) continues her work "room laundering." She struggles to solve the worries of ghosts staying in the rooms. Meanwhile, the relationship of Miko Yakumo and Akito Nijikawa (Kentaro Ito) develop romantically.

trailers.title: Room Laundering (Rûmu rondaringu) theatrical trailer - Kenji Katagiri-directed movie
